title: Onboarding - Animations
scenario: Verify that animations play correctly during the Onboarding flow, including after repeated openings and while interacting with UI elements.
steps: Launch the app with an Osprey/Term/Emu device connected.
Go to Poly Lens Menu > User Guides.
Tap on onboarding for your device.

Go through the entire onboarding and verify animations play correctly on each screen. While an animation is playing, test: tapping on the animation, swiping right/left, tapping the "Next" button, tapping "X", and tapping "Done" or "User Guide".
Go through Onboarding again to confirm animations play properly every time the user opens Onboarding.
expected: Animations play correctly on each screen during the Onboarding flow, and animations play properly every time the user opens Onboarding.
